## Molecular

| **[A formal proof of the Ramanujan--Nagell theorem in Lean 4](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09808v2)** | 2026-06-01 | <details><summary>v2: s...</summary><p>v2: substantial revision; the Lean 4 formalization is rewritten to work directly in the Euclidean domain R = Z[(1+sqrt(-7))/2] rather than via the ring of integers of Q(sqrt(-7)), shortening it from ~3,570 to ~1,800 lines, with the exposition revised to match</p></details> |
